mapper.select:
SELECT i.*, p.name as productName, p.code as productCode, p.spec as productSpec, p.unit, w.name as warehouseName, p.safety_stock as safetyStock, p.max_stock as maxStock FROM stock_inventory i JOIN base_product p ON i.product_id = p.id JOIN base_warehouse w ON i.warehouse_id = w.id
AND i.product_id = #{productId} AND i.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}
AND (p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY i.update_time DESC

SELECT i.id, i.product_id as productId, i.warehouse_id as warehouseId, i.zone_id as zoneId, i.batch_no as batchNo, i.quantity, i.locked_quantity as lockedQuantity, i.production_date as productionDate, i.expiry_date as expiryDate, i.version, i.create_time as createTime, i.update_time as updateTime, p.name as productName, p.code as productCode, p.spec as productSpec, p.unit, w.name as warehouseName, p.safety_stock as safetyStock, p.max_stock as maxStock FROM stock_inventory i JOIN base_product p ON i.product_id = p.id JOIN base_warehouse w ON i.warehouse_id = w.id
AND i.product_id = #{productId} AND i.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}
AND (p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY i.update_time DESC
